summary: Phase D4.2 STEP A - References Restoration testing complete. All features working correctly. Backend returns references section with full lifecycle data. Frontend renders Reference 1 and Reference 2 as proper requirement cards with verified badges, company names, verification dates, expandable referee details, View Response button, and History button.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test employee d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77 (Olakunle Alonge) with 2 verified references
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase D4.2 STEP A References Restoration complete. References section appears in Compliance File tab after Agreements section. Reference 1 (Kent community NHS) and Reference 2 (Vankol homes and support services limited) both verified. Reference rows show: green checkmark icon, 'Verified' badge, company name, verification date. Clicking row expands to show declared referee details (name, company, email, phone). Verified status box shows verifier ID and date. View Response button appears on Reference 2 (has response). History button available on all reference rows.

references_section_in_compliance_file.details: References section appears with title 'References' in Compliance File tab

reference_1_and_2_rows_render.details: Both Reference 1 and Reference 2 rows render correctly with data-testid attributes

verified_references_green_checkmark.details: Verified references show green checkmark icon and 'Verified' badge

expandable_referee_details.details: Clicking reference row expands to show declared referee details

declared_referee_info.details: Expanded view shows name, company, email, phone of referee

verified_status_box.details: Verified status box shows verifier ID and date

view_response_button.details: View Response button appears on Reference 2 (has response)

history_button.details: History button available on reference rows

backend_references_rows_array.details: Backend compliance-file endpoint returns references.rows array with 2 rows

reference_row_lifecycle_status.details: Reference row includes lifecycle_status field (verified for both)

reference_row_verified_field.details: Reference row includes verified field (true for both)

reference_row_has_response_field.details: Reference row includes has_response field (false for ref1, true for ref2)
